description: A `partial match` inside a markup interpolation (a rendering context) fires E-TYPE-081 (§18.18). The `${ partial match @status { .Active :> "active" } }` covers only `.Active` and, being partial, would silently produce no output for `.Inactive` — indistinguishable from a missing case — so the type system reports E-TYPE-081. Incidental W-PROGRAM-SPA-INFERRED is ignored by superset matching.
rationale: §18.18 `partial match` is forbidden in a rendering or lift context: silently omitting output for unhandled variants is incoherent where concrete markup must be produced, so the compiler SHALL emit E-TYPE-081. Cover all variants or move the match to a value position.
